identity.name: PisoFi Commander
identity.description: A lightweight, robust control panel for low-resource network vending machines. It prioritizes clarity, speed, and visibility in variable lighting conditions.
principles: Function over form: Every pixel must serve a monitoring or control purpose.
High legibility: Text must be readable on small screens in bright sunlight.
Low latency: Interactions must feel instant; animations are minimal and purposeful.
Hardware-aware: The UI visually reflects the physical state of the board (GPIO, Heat, CPU).

typography.instructions: Use IBM Plex Sans for all UI elements. Use JetBrains Mono for IP addresses, MAC addresses, GPIO pin numbers, and Voucher codes.

containers.sidebar: w-64 hidden md:flex flex-col border-r bg-card h-screen sticky top-0

cards.header_style: flex flex-row items-center justify-between space-y-0 pb-2

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-sm h-9 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium text-sm transition-colors focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-ring disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 shadow-sm h-9 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium text-sm
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground h-9 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium text-sm
buttons.destructive: bg-destructive text-destructive-foreground hover:bg-destructive/90 shadow-sm h-9 px-4 py-2 rounded-md font-medium text-sm

inputs.default: flex h-9 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-transparent px-3 py-1 text-sm shadow-sm transition-colors file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-ring disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

badges.default: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2 border-transparent bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/80

gpio_grid.description: A visual representation of the 40-pin header. 2 columns, 20 rows.
gpio_grid.style: grid grid-cols-2 gap-x-8 gap-y-1 w-fit mx-auto font-mono text-xs

voucher_ticket.description: CSS-only style for thermal printer compatibility.
voucher_ticket.style: bg-white text-black p-4 border-2 border-dashed border-gray-300 w-64 mx-auto font-mono text-center

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure all text is APCA compliant against background.
accessibility.focus_states: Visible ring-2 ring-primary on all interactive elements.

instructions_to_main_agent: Do not use gradients for backgrounds, keep it flat and clean for performance.
For the Dashboard, use a dense grid layout (Bento Mode B).
For GPIO visualization, creating a CSS grid is better than an image.
Ensure the layout collapses gracefully to a single column on mobile.
Use 'Recharts' for bandwidth and sales graphs.
Implement a 'System Status' persistent widget in the header (CPU/RAM/Temp).
universal_guidelines: Do not use generic centered layouts. Use dashboard grids.
Avoid 'Inter' font for headings; use 'IBM Plex Sans'.
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical (p-6, p-8).
Every interaction needs a hover state.
Do not ask the user for clarifications; assume reasonable defaults.
